narrative:
Bay Village-03-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,011 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
